title: Ready-to-use therapeutic food (RUTF) for home-based nutritional rehabilitation of severe wasting and/or nutritional oedema in infants and children from 6 months to 5 years of age: protocol for a Cochrane review update
author: Schoonees, Anel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This file is the protocol for an update of a Cochrane review ( https://doi.org/10.1002/14651858.CD009000.pub3 ). Feedback on this protocol was provided by Cochrane’s Central Editorial Service.
steps_raw: This file is the protocol for an update of a Cochrane review ( https://doi.org/10.1002/14651858.CD009000.pub3 ). Feedback on this protocol was provided by Cochrane’s Central Editorial Service.
